testcase.name: contextLoads

error.message: ApplicationContext failure threshold (1) exceeded: skipping repeated attempt to load context for [WebMergedContextConfiguration@2eda072 testClass = top.zxY.SpringBoot_week03.SpringBootWeek03ApplicationTests, locations = [], classes = [top.zxY.SpringBoot_week03.SpringBootWeek03Application], contextInitializerClasses = [], activeProfiles = [], propertySourceDescriptors = [], propertySourceProperties = ["org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper=true"], contextCustomizers = [org.springframework.boot.test.context.PropertyMappingContextCustomizer@0, org.springframework.boot.test.context.filter.ExcludeFilterContextCustomizer@426b6a74, org.springframework.boot.test.json.DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizerFactory$DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizer@292d1c71, org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.OnFailureConditionReportContextCustomizerFactory$OnFailureConditionReportContextCustomizer@1c55f277, org.springframework.test.context.support.DynamicPropertiesContextCustomizer@0, org.springframework.boot.webmvc.test.autoconfigure.WebDriverContextCustomizer@f27ea3, org.springframework.boot.web.server.context.SpringBootTestRandomPortContextCustomizer@4bf3798b, org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestAnnotation@1341da93], resourceBasePath = "src/main/webapp", contextLoader = org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootContextLoader, parent = null]
